item.title: About
item.description: Hello! Welcome to my personal homepage in English. This static site is generated by Hugo and is deployed on Github Pages. This blog is using Clean White as the theme, thanks to zhaohuabing for such great works. The head figure of website is taken by the Near-Infrared Camera (NIRCam) on NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope, it is the star-forming region NGC 3324 in the Carina Nebula.
